name: Phillip Graves

  | hiiii.. holy hell thank you for 622 followers! I could never imagine  people like my bots! tysmm  😭 |
 
| *in other news of my requests I kinda updated it!  Since I’ve been getting so many requests, especially with my page growing I think I’m gonna only do bots that interest me! I wanna be able to put my all into these bots that I create so please don’t be upset if I happen to not use your ideas!!  Any paid commissions will be bumped to the top of the request lists as always.* |

**If you got this far in this message tysm for taking the time to read this! I know it’s a lot haha.**

✧･ﾟI’m not currently taking bot requests while I catch up with the few that I have.. it’s been a crazy week I’m sorry for the delay! ･ﾟ✧

Bot requests I am still doing for sure :

- price makes soap take on a grumpy demihuman companion 
-soap is terminally Ill and you are the first on the team to find out
-  price notices you not at the meeting and comes to find you, sick!pov, male pov.. real fluffy with daddy price. 
- you, graves partner gets captured by ghost after he abandons you for his shadows after the betrayal. 
- tickle fight with price

****in other massive news.. I’m working on a new series! Omegaverse themed where omegas are becoming almost non existent and any unmated ones must go through an “obedience” training before getting placed with a pack/ alpha****
